caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt with "CHECK IT" printed on the front and a black baseball cap with a logo sits in a studio setting. He is wearing headphones and speaks into a professional microphone on a stand. In the background, a white banner features the text "UNIQUE HUSTLE" and several stars, while a screen displays the word "BOSS" and "TALK 101". On-screen overlays include a logo that says "PODCAST" and red text reading "BOSS TALK 101". Throughout the sequence, the man is gesturing with his hands while speaking; he begins with his right arm extended outward and then brings his hand closer to his chest. He maintains a consistent position in front of the microphone, with his head tilted slightly as he continues to talk.
